title: phegopteris decurrenti-alata
intro: Phegopteris decurrenti-alata, also known as the deciduous maidenhair fern, is a type of vascular plant belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae. The medicinal properties of Phegopteris decurrenti-alata include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive problems, making it a valuable herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Phegopteris decurrenti-alata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal purposes.
